constraint.description: InspectorEntry is no longer a legal top-level reusable slotcontent role.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType) WHERE type.viewRole = 'INSPECTOR_ENTRY' RETURN type.relativePath AS Source, 'no *InspectorEntry.java files in src/view/**' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Reusable slotcontent units are closed to exactly one *View.java, exactly one same-stem *ViewInputEvent.java, and exactly one *ContentModel.java.' AS Details ORDER BY Source
